s2.title: KraMZ production capacity exceeds 130 thousand tons per year
s2.text: KraMZ ships more than 10 thousand tons of finished products monthly to various regions of the country, as well as near and far abroad

s3.title: One of the country's largest processors
s3.subtitle: Years of accumulated experience and a quality control system at all stages of production guarantee reliability, precision and consistency of characteristics to consumers of aluminum semi-finished products

stats.label: HARD ALLOYS: pipes, rods, profiles for engineering, aviation, shipbuilding and other transport segments
SOFT ALLOYS: standard profile per customer drawings for construction, bridge building, load-bearing systems and transport segments
Manufactured for cities of the Russian Federation and foreign customers

s4.title: Clean Aluminum
paragraphs: KraMZ pays great attention to environmental issues and strives to minimize the negative impact on the environment. The climate agenda is one of the key areas of KraMZ's environmental activities and is an integral part of the company's corporate culture.

The carbon footprint of ALLOW is one of the lowest in the industry. We continue our work in reducing greenhouse gas emissions and have set ourselves the task: increasing the use of ALLOW in the company's products.
We support our clients' desire to increase social responsibility and are ready to move in this direction together!
